brand.name: Strategic CFO Advisory
brand.tagline: Elite Financial Leadership for Middle Market Companies

offer.what: Fractional / part-time / interim CFO services and investment banking advisory (M&A, capital raising, valuation) for middle market companies.
offer.coreOutcome: Increase company value 2-3x — through financial clarity, operational discipline, and elite transaction execution — so founders and owners can exit, raise capital, or scale with institutional-grade confidence.
offer.pricePoint: Not published; ROI calculator default suggests ~$4,375/month for 20 hrs/month at $5M ARR. Likely $3K–$15K+/month retainer for CFO advisory; investment banking billed as project fees / success fees.
offer.commitment: Ongoing retainer for CFO advisory; project-based for investment banking transactions.
leadMagnets: CFO's Guide to Strategic Growth in 2026 (PDF playbook)
Series A Fundraising Checklist (due diligence checklist)

audience.icp: Founder-owned or PE-backed middle market companies with $10M–$500M in annual revenue that lack full-time CFO leadership and are preparing for an exit, capital raise, or significant financial transformation.
painPoints: No institutional-grade financial leadership without paying a full-time CFO salary
Messy or non-audit-ready financials blocking a sale or fundraise
Burning cash too fast / insufficient runway visibility
Investors passing on deals due to poor unit economics story
Missing the valuation multiple they deserve at exit
No strategic financial roadmap to guide growth decisions
segments: Growth-stage companies raising Series A/B capital
Companies needing ongoing fractional CFO leadership
Distressed / high-burn companies needing financial triage

salesCycle.length: Weeks to months — complex B2B professional services requiring trust and custom scoping
salesCycle.trial: Free 30-minute strategic consultation with immediate valuation insights; no obligation
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Free consultation → custom proposal with clear ROI projection → engagement kickoff
salesCycle.topObjection: Cost vs. ROI justification — 'Can I afford a fractional CFO?' (addressed directly with an interactive ROI calculator on the homepage)

ahaMoment: Delivery of a 60-day strategic roadmap with actionable recommendations — the first concrete proof of value after engagement begins. The free consultation itself is designed to deliver an immediate 'aha' via on-the-spot valuation insights.

retention.recurring: Fractional CFO engagements are ongoing monthly retainers; investment banking is project/transaction-based with success fees.
retention.expansion: Upsell from CFO advisory retainer into investment banking services (e.g., sell-side M&A or capital raise); increase advisory scope and hours as company grows.
retention.churnRisk: Natural project end — once a transaction closes or a crisis is resolved, the perceived need for the retainer drops. Must continuously demonstrate ongoing strategic value to retain post-transaction clients.

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & onboarding sequence — no visible nurture after a lead inquiry or consultation booking
Lead-magnet nurture — three strong lead magnets exist but no evident drip/education sequence follows the download
Trial/consult conversion — prospects who book a call but don't sign need a follow-up sequence to close
Booking reminders & no-show recovery — high-value consultations need confirmation and re-booking flows
Value newsletter — no ongoing thought-leadership cadence to stay top-of-mind during long consideration cycles
Referral / advocacy — impressive case studies (Blackstone, $50M exits) but no visible referral capture system
Win-back / re-engagement — past leads and completed-project clients are an untapped re-engagement audience
toneVoice: Authoritative and credibility-led — leads with Wall Street pedigree (Deloitte, Wells Fargo IB, Ivy League) and hard numbers. Professional but accessible; avoids jargon overload in favor of outcome language ('2-3x value', '40% burn reduction'). Confident without being arrogant. Tone sits closer to formal than casual.
compliance: Financial services — holds Series 7, 63, 79 securities licenses; investment banking advisory is regulated. Emails must avoid performance guarantees and unqualified ROI claims. All engagements operate under NDA. Standard CAN-SPAM / GDPR opt-out requirements apply.
